title: Carrier (CARR) Boosts Fire & Security Efforts With Onity's Deal
text: Carrier's (CARR) Onity enters into reseller agreements with Trachte Building Systems and Trac-Rite, which are expected to expand the availability of its Passport Locking Solution.

title: 3 Electronics Stocks to Watch From a Challenging Industry
text: Electronics stocks Carrier Global (CARR), Sigma Lithium (SGML) and Flex (FLEX) are likely to benefit from investments in infrastructure and expanded capacity despite the supply-chain and macroeconomic headwinds.

title: Carrier Named Best HVAC Company by U.S. News & World Report for Second Consecutive Year
text: Carrier brands again hold first and second place on 2023 list INDIANAPOLIS , March 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Carrier has been named the best HVAC company of 2023 by U.S. News & World Report's 360 Reviews team. This is the second consecutive year that Carrier ranked No.

title: Carrier Global Can Continue Its Outperformance
text: CARR's revenue should benefit from price hikes, high backlog levels, long-term drivers like sustainability and M&As. Margins are likely to remain flat YoY in FY23 but should improve in the long term.

title: The Retirees' Dividend Portfolio: John And Jane's February 2023 Taxable Account Update
text: The Taxable Account generated $1,850.78 of dividend income for February 2023 compared with $1,493.49 of dividend income for February 2022. The Taxable Account had a balance of $533.4K as of February 28, 2023, vs. $530.1K on February 28, 2022. The annualized cost basis yield is 5.23%.

title: Carrier Ranks No. 8 on Barron's 100 Most Sustainable Companies 2023 List
text: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. , March 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), the leading global provider of healthy, safe, sustainable and intelligent building and cold chain solutions, ranked eighth on Barron's 2023 list of the 100 Most Sustainable Companies.

title: My Dividend Growth Income - February 2023 Update
text: Dividends received in February totaled $244.23. Forward dividend income grew by $71.65, translating to M/M growth of 1.27%.
